NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204 Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petitioner: Michael J. Powers appeared with Counsel Judy Hitchcock.
Respondent: Cheryl Lee Johnson (no appearance).

Petitioner was sworn and examined.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 150 yards away from the protected person: Michael J. Powers, his Residence and his vehicle.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

The Defendant is ordered to move out immediately from and not return to 2518 Clement St., Apt. #2, San Francisco, CA 94121.

The Defendant shall not own, possess, have, buy or try to buy, receive or try to receive, or in any other way get a gun or firearm.

See attachment to Order After Hearing, Item 12 for additional orders.

Expires July 21, 2012.

Order signed in open court.
